name: Love's Travel Stop #379
description: Full-service Love's travel center directly off I-10 at the Lee/US-90 exit with fuel lanes, showers, a CAT scale and truck service bays.

name: Busy Bee #25 Travel Plaza
description: Popular independent Busy Bee travel plaza at the I-10/US-129 interchange with fuel lanes, showers, laundry, a CAT scale and a convenience store with quick-service food.

name: Penn Oil - Live Oak
description: Independent fuel and truck-parking stop at the I-10/US-129 interchange with a store and deli food.

name: Pilot Travel Center #087
description: Pilot travel center off I-10 at the US-301 Baldwin exit with diesel lanes, showers, a Subway, laundry and a CAT scale.

name: TA Baldwin Travel Center

name: Johnson & Johnson Truck Stop
description: Independent fuel stop and store at the I-10/SR-53 Madison exit with deli food and truck parking.

name: Exxon Truck Parking - Macclenny
description: Fuel station with a store and truck parking at the I-10/FL-121 Macclenny exit.

name: S & S Food Store - Lake City
description: Independent fuel and truck-parking stop with a store and deli at the I-10/US-441 Lake City exit.
